name: Market Research & Insights
student_summary: Find out what people really think and buy — the insight engine of business.
overview: Find out what people really think and buy — the insight engine of business. Market Research & Insights sits in the Strategy & Insights family of Communication, Marketing & Sales. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You enjoy breaking problems into parts and reasoning them through
You keep asking why until you reach the bottom of things
who_should_avoid: You strongly prefer solitary desk work over this field's day-to-day reality
daily_responsibilities: Apply survey design to real problems
Collaborate with your team using qualitative research
Keep improving at statistical analysis — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Laboratories and research facilities with focused desk analysis
alternative_paths: Build an audience/portfolio first — degrees optional
scope: Demand outlook in India is booming; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: A broad Strategy & Insights foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Market Research & Insights is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of qualitative research
projects: Beginner: explore survey design with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using SPSS
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Business Analytics: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Consumer Psychology: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Advertising & Brand Management: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Market Research & Insights pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹5 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹18 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on Mathematics, Psychology. Typical degrees: B.A./B.Sc + MBA/M.Sc, Statistics helps. Alternatives exist: build an audience/portfolio first — degrees optional.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Market Research & Insights evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Market Research & Insights is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
